title: WNBA Analytics Phase 3 — Visualization Layer & Streamlit UI Contract

viz_functions.name: trend_line
viz_functions.description: Line chart with optional rolling average overlay and confidence interval bands

viz_functions.name: animated_timeline
viz_functions.description: Animated scatter plot over time (placeholder implementation)

viz_functions.name: heat_map
viz_functions.description: 2D heatmap with color intensity representing values

viz_functions.name: scatter_correlation
viz_functions.description: Scatter plot with optional regression line and statistical annotations
viz_functions.annotations: Shows R², p-value, r in top-left corner when stats_dict provided

viz_functions.name: split_comparison
viz_functions.description: Grouped bar or line chart comparing values across categories

viz_functions.name: radar_chart
viz_functions.description: Spider/radar chart for multi-stat comparison with normalized values

params.name: values_cols
params.description: Column names to plot (one trace per column)

viz_functions.normalization: Values normalized to 0-100 range per stat

viz_functions.name: drilldown_table
viz_functions.description: Summary bar chart designed to work with companion selectbox for drill-down

viz_functions.name: apply_theme
viz_functions.description: Apply consistent WNBA Analytics styling to a Plotly figure

viz_functions.name: no_data_chart
viz_functions.description: Placeholder figure with centered message for empty DataFrames

params.name: message
params.default: No data available for the selected filters

section_details.name: Team Comparison
section_details.description: Line chart of two teams' stat over time

section_details.name: Head to Head
section_details.description: All games between two teams with summary stats

section_details.name: Team Splits
section_details.description: Stats split by home/away, rest_days, conference, month

section_details.name: Team Rankings
section_details.description: Horizontal bar chart of all teams ranked by stat

section_details.name: Player Game Log
section_details.description: All games with full box score for a player

section_details.name: Rolling Trends
section_details.description: n-game rolling average with confidence band

section_details.name: Player Splits
section_details.description: Stats split by home/away, opponent, rest_days, month

section_details.name: Player vs Team
section_details.description: Home vs Away performance against specific opponent

section_details.name: Player Comparison
section_details.description: Radar chart and full stat table side-by-side

section_details.name: Rest Day Impact
section_details.description: Performance across rest categories with p-values

section_details.name: Travel Impact
section_details.description: Distance buckets vs performance with stats

section_details.name: Home/Away Analysis
section_details.description: Home vs away with win percentage

section_details.name: Referee Impact
section_details.description: Top referees by deviation with game log drill-down

section_details.name: Two-Stat Correlation
section_details.description: Scatter with regression line, R², p-value annotation

section_details.name: Discovery
section_details.description: Scan all stat pairs for significant correlations

wnba_team_colors.description: 13 WNBA teams with primary and secondary colors
